description_long: This bungalow features a low, sprawling profile with a dark, multi-faceted roof and exterior walls clad in textured stone. The roof has a unique angular design with a central skylight or vent, adding architectural interest. Windows are minimal and asymmetrically placed, with a large garage door and a single entry door visible on one facade. The structure appears solid and robust, with no visible porch or veranda. The color palette is dominated by earthy browns and grays, giving it a modern yet rustic appearance. The overall design suggests a contemporary take on the classic bungalow, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern stone-clad bungalow with a dark, angular roof, minimal windows, and a large garage door, featuring a contemporary and robust appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with a large garage door, a single entry door, and two small windows set in stone walls beneath the dark roof.
description_view_1: From this angle, the angular roof and its central skylight or vent are prominent, with limited visibility of windows and doors.
description_view_2: The rear or side view highlights the long, uninterrupted stone wall and the unique roof shape, with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the garage door and entry door, presenting the most accessible and functional side of the bungalow.
